# Asaptic Cross-Standard (asaptic.com/standard)
## LLM-friendly index of China-export compliance comparisons

Structured, source-linked comparisons of the gap between Chinese GB standards and a destination market’s MANDATORY requirements, per product × market. Trilingual EN / 简体中文 / 繁體中文.

Methodology: https://asaptic.com/standard/methodology
Provenance: data is AI-compiled and cross-checked by multiple AI models; it is NOT human-verified. Informational only — confirm every requirement with the official regulator or standards body and a qualified professional before relying on it. Not legal, certification, customs, or market-access advice.

### Comparison index (87 live comparisons)
- Battery energy storage (BESS) (China → AUSTRALIA, BRAZIL, EU, INDIA, JAPAN, SAUDI, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Cosmetics & personal care (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Data-center liquid cooling (cold plate / CDU) (China → EU, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Electric bicycle (e-bike) (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Water electrolyzer (green hydrogen, AEM/PEM) (China → EU, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- EV charger (China → AUSTRALIA, BRAZIL, EU, INDIA, JAPAN, SAUDI, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Food-contact materials (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Furniture (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- GaN fast charger / power adapter (China → EU, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Air-source heat pump (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Industrial electric motor (China → AUSTRALIA, BRAZIL, EU, INDIA, JAPAN, SAUDI, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- LED luminaire (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Lithium battery / power bank (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Home/clinical medical device (China → AUSTRALIA, BRAZIL, CANADA, EU, INDIA, JAPAN, SAUDI, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Sodium-ion battery storage (Na-ion) (China → EU, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Perovskite / tandem PV module (China → EU, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- PPE / respirator (mask) (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Grid-tied PV inverter (China → AUSTRALIA, BRAZIL, EU, INDIA, JAPAN, SAUDI, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Refrigerator / cold appliance (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Textiles & apparel (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Toys & children’s products (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/
- Wireless / IoT device (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/

Machine-readable JSON per comparison: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/<slug>.json (index: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/index.json).

Each page leads with a one-line Compliance Verdict, then a gap table (target requirement vs closest Chinese GB equivalent vs the gap), with an official source + access date per row.
